title: Building an AI app: A low-code guide for small teams
summary: Google Cloud offers a low-code approach to building AI applications using Gemini, Cloud SQL, and AlloyDB for PostgreSQL. The platform enables small teams to implement natural language interfaces, hybrid search, image search, and recommendations through auto-generated code without requiring specialized AI expertise.
writeup: This video walks through Google Cloud's low-code approach to building AI applications with Gemini, Cloud SQL, and AlloyDB for PostgreSQL. It targets small teams that lack specialized AI expertise, showing how auto-generated code can stand up features like natural language interfaces, hybrid search, image search, and recommendations. The takeaway: these capabilities, including vector search, become accessible without deep AI background by relying on the platform's managed databases and generated code.
